posts.author: AmyQ (Amy Quayle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Make Workforms use similar functionality to Easyforms.

What are you trying to achieve

We have external clients who send us job requests. There is a lot of information that our team needs in order to complete jobs that we do not wish to ask our clients each time on a form. Now, Easyforms does do this, however, it has other limitations which means it doesn’t work as well as Workforms. Surely if Easyforms can do it Workforms can? We would really like not to have to give guest access to Monday.com to clients if we can avoid it.
